---
title: "nitrix.stats.inference.permutation"
generated: true
signature-hash: 230d3a269fbf9c71
description: "Exchangeability operators for permutation inference."
listing:
  id: nitrix-stats-inference-permutation-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-stats-inference-permutation/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.stats.inference.permutation`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
Exchangeability operators for permutation inference.

Keyed pure generators that build the set of relabellings used by
`randomise`-style permutation tests:

- [`sign_flips`](nitrix-stats-inference-permutation/sign_flips.qmd) -- the $\pm 1$ sign-flip matrix for symmetric /
  one-sample tests (the null is invariant to flipping an exchangeable
  observation's sign).
- [`permutations`](nitrix-stats-inference-permutation/permutations.qmd) -- the row-permutation index matrix for shuffle-based
  tests (two-sample, regression).

Both honour **exchangeability blocks**: with a per-observation `blocks` label,
sign flips act per *whole block* (a block flips together) and permutations act
*within* each block (an observation can only move to a same-block position).
The first row is always the identity (the unpermuted data), so the observed
statistic is one of the permutations -- the standard `count / n_perm`
convention with $p \geq 1 / n_{\mathrm{perm}}$.

The choice of random key is left to the caller; these generators are
deterministic given `(shape, key)`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n_perm` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `N` | observations — time points, subjects, or sampled points |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-stats-inference-permutation-symbols}
:::
